_doc: Middleware phase registry. File prefixes still define order; this file names the canonical phase ranges so audits/docs do not invent parallel ordering stories.
_suffix_rule: A filename may carry an optional lowercase-letter suffix on its numeric prefix (e.g. 06a_, 25a_) to insert a module between integer slots without renumbering. The INTEGER part alone determines the phase: 06a falls in the same phase as range member 6. Enforced by middleware/index.js _orderPrefix and the ProxyMiddlewareRegistryVerifier (exactly-one-phase check).

phases.description: Request normalization, system replacement, tool surface shaping
Early noise removal, cheap prefetch, and payload sanitization
Tool-result enrichment, nexus tracking, activity/error observation
Autocommit, lifesaver surfacing, false-positive gates, dumps, and result hygiene
